name: e2e-synthesize-helper
description: Parallel synthesize helper receives explicit context after main tasks finish.

tasks.task: Reply exactly SYNTHESIZE_SOURCE_A_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly SYNTHESIZE_SOURCE_B_TOKEN and do not inspect or modify files.

synthesize.task: If the Synthesize Context includes SYNTHESIZE_SOURCE_A_TOKEN and SYNTHESIZE_SOURCE_B_TOKEN in output previews, reply exactly E2E_SYNTHESIZE_OK. Otherwise reply E2E_SYNTHESIZE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
